quote: I had the pleasure of hiring Erroll in 2023 as a Graphic Designer for Starfire Direct, and from day one he became an essential part of the marketing team. Throughout our time working together, Erroll consistently brought creativity, reliability, and adaptability to every project. His work touched everything from social media content and email marketing in Klaviyo to product merchandising and backend maintenance in Shopify. Erroll is one of the most genuine and thoughtful people I’ve worked with. He is communicative, coachable, and always open to feedback. Our creative reviews and brainstorming sessions were some of the most productive and enjoyable parts of my day. Erroll always took critiques with a positive attitude and used them to improve his work. He is highly skilled in Adobe Creative Cloud and has grown into a confident and capable Shopify operator as well. His ability to manage both design and eCommerce responsibilities makes him a true asset to any team. Erroll, I’m proud of how far you’ve come. Keep pushing forward. You are going to do amazing things.
shortQuote: Erroll consistently brought creativity, reliability, and adaptability to every project. His ability to manage both design and eCommerce responsibilities makes him a true asset to any team.
author: Scotty Trento
title: Marketing Executive | Scaling eCommerce Brands through Smarter Growth, SEO & Performance Media
